slug: UI_设计的暗模式_如何用设计让你多花钱多刷手机
title: UI 设计的暗模式——如何用设计让你多花钱多刷手机

outline.concept: Dark patterns are interface choices that exploit predictable cognitive shortcuts to benefit the company at your expense — they work not because you're stupid, but because your brain conserves effort by running on defaults and heuristics, and designers know exactly which heuristics to hijack.
outline.query: 暗模式 误导 设计套路 dark pattern 被骗 点击 误操作

outline.concept: The default effect: pre-checked boxes and pre-selected options exploit inertia — changing from a default requires active effort, and most people stick with whatever's already chosen even when they'd prefer otherwise. This is why 'auto-renew' is always on by default.
outline.query: 默认勾选 自动续费 pre-selected 预选 忘记取消 订阅 默认选项

outline.concept: Friction asymmetry (roach motel): paths that benefit the company are frictionless — one click to subscribe — while paths that benefit you are buried — five clicks plus a phone call to cancel. This exploits your tendency to take the path of least resistance every time.
outline.query: 取消订阅 退订 找不到 客服电话 隐藏 button buried 难找

outline.concept: Variable reward loop: social feeds deliver content unpredictably — you never know if the next swipe is rewarding or boring, and that uncertainty (not pleasure) drives compulsive scrolling. It's the same mechanism as a slot machine: the occasional jackpot keeps you pulling the lever.
outline.query: 刷手机 停不下来 抖音 TikTok 下一个 刷到 刷不到 熬夜

outline.concept: These patterns compound: a default subscription you didn't notice + a cancellation process that's deliberately confusing + a feed that keeps you scrolling past the 'manage subscription' page — each bias reinforces the others, making the total manipulation far greater than any single technique alone.
outline.query: 套路叠加 忘记取消 没注意到 一直刷 复合 多个陷阱
